creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> I've sent patch to you just after receiving this mail. I was wandering
> why was no response. I just received mail bounce (for envelope dated
> Dec 9), freebsd.org mailserver don't like my mailserver (it does not
> have reverse dns record).

I have got this patch, and I have mailed you back with the report that
this patch results in broken port:


creating testbench
Making all in doc
Making all in html
Making html in html
make: don't know how to make html-am. Stop
*** Error code 1

Stop in /work/a/ports/devel/log4cpp/work/log4cpp-0.3.5rc3/doc.

Can you please fix this build failure?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Geography is only physics slowed down, with a few trees stuck on it...
  -- Terry Pratchett
